description: Doti workflow profile for building scaffold-dotnet and its first generated .NET CLI solution template.

implementedCommands.hygieneChanged: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- hygiene scan --repo . --scope changed --source staged --json
implementedCommands.hygieneRange: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- hygiene scan --repo . --scope changed --base <ref> --head <ref> --json
implementedCommands.hygieneFull: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- hygiene scan --repo . --scope all --json
implementedCommands.gitleaksVerify: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- hygiene gitleaks verify --repo . --json
implementedCommands.gitleaksUpdateCheck: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- hygiene gitleaks update-check --repo . --json
implementedCommands.dotiRenderSkills: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti render-skills --repo . --agents codex,claude --json
implementedCommands.dotiRenderSkillsCheck: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti render-skills --repo . --agents codex,claude --check --json
implementedCommands.dotiInstall: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti install --repo <path> --agents codex,claude --json
implementedCommands.gateRun: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- gate run --repo <path> --profile auto --json
implementedCommands.dotiCycleStamp: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti cycle stamp --stage <id> --feature <NNN-slug> --repo . --json
implementedCommands.dotiCycleStatus: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti cycle status --repo . --json
implementedCommands.dotiCycleCheck: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti cycle check --stage <id> --repo . --json
implementedCommands.dotiCycleCommit: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti cycle commit --message <m> --repo . --json
implementedCommands.dotiQuestionCheck: dotnet run --project tools/Hx.Runner.Cli -- doti question check --file <path> --repo . --json

selfHostingStatus.commandAvailabilityFootnote: Hygiene scanning, restore/build/test, the bootstrap CLI, the platform probe, the Doti renderer, the `dotnet new` template pack, `Hx.Scaffold.Cli new`/`version`/`update`/`prereq`, `doti install`/`doti install-hooks`, the architecture gate, `gate run`, the affected-test planner (`Hx.Impact.Cli plan`), GitVersion versioning (`version calculate`/`version bump`), and the security gate (`security scan` — package-vulnerability SCA via `dotnet list package --vulnerable`, plus the build-integrated analyzer SAST status; enforced at release, advisory in dev) are all available. The scaffold CLI now uses a trusted prerequisite manifest for .NET SDK/Git/directory preflight; Windows automatic remediation is only through `hx prereq install` with release-defined winget package/source metadata and an exact operator-approved plan digest. The .NET security analyzers + Gitleaks are the SAST gate. Secret scanning is the vendored Gitleaks; Sentrux is pinned to the Heurex fork v0.5.11 for declared RIDs with matching grammars; GitVersion is vendored for win-x64 (large binary gitignored, an operational vendor step). The build is fully green on win-x64; other undeclared tool RIDs fail closed. The doti cycle-state substrate (`doti cycle stamp`/`status`: diff-bound stage proofs + freshness detection) and the single-sourced Operator-Question Protocol render into every skill + the agent context. `cycle stamp` now fails closed when a non-initial stage's prerequisites are missing, stale, or invalid, and when the first-stage feature slug is not numbered (`NNN-short-name`). The enforcing chokepoints are `doti cycle check` (fail-closed prerequisites), `doti cycle commit` (the sole sanctioned commit path; refuses unless a fresh drift-review + task-hash, a fresh passing persisted gate proof with recomputable affected-test hashes, and a clean staged scope), `doti question check` (the operator-question validator), and an untracked insurance pre-commit hook (`doti install-hooks`). `new`, `update`, and `doti install` auto-arm or refresh the Doti hook for Git repos and refuse to overwrite non-Doti pre-commit hooks. `gate run` persists a change-set-bound proof. Direct `dotnet test` remains useful for diagnosis but cannot satisfy commit proof.
selfHostingStatus.rootMaturityNote: `Hx.Scaffold.Cli new` is the single generation entry point and runs trusted prerequisite preflight before output mutation; `hx prereq check` reports .NET SDK/Git/directory readiness and `hx prereq install` can run only a Windows winget plan whose release-defined package/source metadata and manifest identity match an exact operator-approved digest. `gate run --profile <auto|advisory|normal|release>` aggregates the deterministic ladder into one fail-closed `GateProof`; the proof includes canonical affected-test planner, test-scope, and execution hashes that `doti cycle commit` recomputes before committing. The affected-test planner (`Hx.Impact.Cli plan`) deterministically scopes the gate's normal/advisory test run (project-graph reverse-closure -> covering test projects; fail-closed escalation); release runs the full suite. The self-hosted gate executes prebuilt test outputs after the command-backed build so it cannot overwrite its own loaded runner assemblies. Human help for all scaffold CLIs routes through one shared rich/plain renderer; `--help-mode plain`, `--plain-help`, `HX_HELP_MODE=plain`, and `NO_COLOR` provide ANSI-free help. Versioning is GitVersion-backed (`version calculate` + `version bump`, annotated tag). The security gate (`security scan`) runs package-vulnerability SCA (`dotnet list package --vulnerable`) + reports the build-integrated analyzer SAST status (CA3xxx/CA5xxx as errors — the build is the SAST enforcement point); enforced at release, advisory in dev. The .NET analyzers + Gitleaks are the SAST gate. Vendored tools (Gitleaks/Sentrux/GitVersion) are pinned + hashed; Sentrux is the Heurex fork v0.5.11 for declared RIDs with matching grammars, and large binaries are gitignored as an operational vendor step. The gate never creates a Sentrux baseline. Installed skills are rendered from one source — edit `doti/core/skills.json` and re-render; do not hand-edit installed skill files. The doti cycle-state substrate (`doti cycle stamp`/`status`) records diff-bound stage proofs + freshness; `stamp` refuses a first-stage feature slug that is not numbered (`NNN-short-name`) and refuses non-initial stages until every transitive prerequisite is stamped + fresh. The enforcing chokepoints are `doti cycle check` (every transitive prerequisite stamped + fresh), `doti cycle commit` (the sole sanctioned commit path — re-verifies a fresh drift-review + task-hash, a fresh passing persisted gate proof with affected-test hashes, and a clean staged scope, then commits; refuses otherwise), `doti question check` (the operator-question validator), plus an untracked, logic-free insurance pre-commit hook (`doti install-hooks`) that redirects bare commits. `Hx.Scaffold.Cli new`, `hx update`, and `doti install` auto-arm/refresh the hook for Git repos and fail hard rather than overwrite non-Doti hooks. `gate run` persists a change-set-bound proof. The workflow is command-enforced at the chokepoints.
